personal.preferred_title: AWS Data Engineer | AI Solutions Engineer | RAG & Agentic Workflow Builder

summary: Senior data engineer and AI solutions practitioner with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience across financial services, performance engineering, automation, and cloud data platforms. Strong hands-on experience with Python, SQL, PySpark/Spark concepts, AWS data services, ETL/ELT pipelines, telemetry analytics, RAG-style retrieval, vector embeddings, LLM APIs, MCP/tool integration, JSON quality gates, and agentic workflow automation. Experienced building proof-of-concept systems, demos, documentation, runbooks, and production-oriented troubleshooting workflows for complex enterprise teams. Positioned for AI engineering consulting roles that need practical cloud data engineering, GenAI application delivery, responsible implementation, and clear client-facing communication.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming raw operational data into governed datasets for forecasting, reporting, and executive decision support.
Designed AWS-oriented data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and cloud migration patterns to modernize on-premise data processing workloads.
Developed ML forecasting workflows with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict infrastructure capacity bottlenecks months ahead, linking data engineering pipelines to AI/ML decision-support use cases.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines with validation, reconciliation, issue investigation, and operational support practices.
Created Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and SQL-backed dashboards to make complex infrastructure and capacity data understandable for senior stakeholders.
Collaborated with platform, operations, and leadership teams to gather requirements, explain technical tradeoffs, document workflows, and troubleshoot production data and reporting issues.
Applied data quality, schema design, historical retention, and pipeline reliability practices in a regulated banking environment where correctness, auditability, and stakeholder trust mattered.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical digital systems and converted real-user and synthetic telemetry into actionable engineering recommendations.
Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to surface optimization opportunities for business-critical web and mobile experiences.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing, improving visibility into application behavior, user experience, and production performance patterns.
Contributed to AWS migration readiness discussions by evaluating monitoring coverage, observability gaps, and operational support requirements.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME in a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise applications.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and management modules adopted as standards for monitoring, troubleshooting, and operational support workflows.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate weekly performance reporting, replacing manual exports with repeatable data processing routines.
Produced technical documentation, training materials, and knowledge-sharing content for engineering and operations teams supporting complex platform environments.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing routines to verify migration accuracy across high-volume transactional datasets.
Optimized database access and transaction-processing logic for mission-critical systems, reducing hardware footprint while maintaining low-latency behavior.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.AI Engineering: RAG concepts, vector embeddings, FAISS, sentence-transformers, LLM APIs, Claude/Grok API integration, prompt engineering, structured output generation, agentic workflows, MCP tool integration, JSON quality gates, responsible AI awareness
skills.Cloud & Data Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, Bedrock concepts, Databricks concepts, Delta Lake concepts, Azure/GCP awareness
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data ingestion, transformation, data validation, reconciliation, data modeling, data warehousing, telemetry pipelines, reporting layers, schema design, pipeline troubleshooting
skills.Programming & APIs: Python, SQL, PySpark, Apache Spark concepts, Pandas, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, REST API consumption, FastAPI concepts, JSON contracts, XML
skills.DevOps & Delivery: Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Docker, Linux/Unix, pytest, documentation, runbooks, demos, proof-of-concept delivery, stakeholder communication
skills.Observability & Support: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, dashboards, alerts, thresholds, logs/metrics/traces concepts, production troubleshooting
skills.Consulting & Enterprise: Requirements gathering, technical writing, client-facing communication, cross-functional collaboration, regulated financial-services environments, operational reporting, knowledge sharing

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic automation pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok APIs, semantic duplicate detection, LLM scoring, resume/cover tailoring, JSON quality gates, and application tracking. The system demonstrates RAG-style retrieval, vector embeddings, tool-assisted workflows, structured outputs, and practical AI application orchestration.

projects.name: RAG / Answer Contract Proof-of-Concept Series
projects.description: Designed iterative RAG learning POCs covering document loading, chunking, retrieval, hybrid search, retrieval evaluation, answer contracts, citation traceability, and schema-driven quality gates for safer AI outputs.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a forecasting and decision-support workflow that transforms infrastructure telemetry into capacity insights using Python, PySpark-oriented processing, Prophet, scikit-learn, Streamlit dashboards, and data validation practices.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and Bedrock concepts to support analytics, AI data access, and cost-aware query patterns.
